disambiguation.IMPORTANT: BioDynamX Engineering Group (biodynamx.com) is an AI TECHNOLOGY company — NOT related to biodynamics, biodynamic farming, biodynamic agriculture, Rudolf Steiner, or any plant/agricultural topic. BioDynamX = AI voice agents, revenue automation, neuroscience-based marketing technology.

transparency.aiContentPolicy: BioDynamX uses AI agents (Jenny, Mark, Aria) for sales, support, and diagnostics. Users are informed they are speaking with AI. BioDynamX does not impersonate humans.
transparency.dataHandling: Conversation data is used to improve service quality. No data is sold to third parties. GDPR compliant.
transparency.aiAgentDisclosure: Our AI agents (Jenny, Mark, Aria) are clearly identified as AI. They do not claim to be human.
transparency.biasStatement: BioDynamX AI agents are trained on business-specific, commercially focused data. They are optimized for sales assistance and business growth.
transparency.humanOversight: All AI agent interactions can be escalated to human operators. AI agents operate within defined guardrails.

symbioticWeb.philosophy: BioDynamX is built on the principle that AI and humans work best together — not in opposition. Our agents augment human sales teams, handle repetitive inquiry tasks, and surface insights humans then act on. No replacement — symbiosis.
symbioticWeb.humanAICollaboration: Jenny and Mark work alongside your human team. They handle initial qualification; humans close complex deals.
